seo.title: Elite Hardscapes | Premium Paving in Aptos
seo.description: 30 years of engineering excellence in custom stone pavers, retaining walls, and outdoor living spaces.

hero.headline: Building Outdoor Dreams With Precision & Trust
hero.subheadline: Expert hardscaping and landscape engineering — from foundation to finish. We deliver on time, on budget, and beyond expectations.

services.title: Custom Stone Pavers
services.description: Premium driveway and patio paving using interlocking stones engineered for decades of durability.

services.title: Structural Retaining Walls
services.description: Engineered walls that protect your property from erosion while adding distinct architectural beauty.

services.title: Outdoor Kitchens
services.description: Fully integrated outdoor cooking and dining spaces featuring built-in grills, fire pits, and custom masonry.

services.title: Pool Deck Resurfacing
services.description: Slip-resistant, heat-reflective pool deck installations using travertine and modern concrete overlays.
